entries.text: Publishing our benchmark dataset on IEEE DataPort with #ieeedataport gave us a citable DOI within days — reproducibility for our IEEE study is much easier now.
entries.consent_note: Discovered via public #ieeedataport post. Editor: Seed sample for pipeline demo — replace URL with real LinkedIn post when curated Auto-published from public #ieeedataport staging.

enrichment.quote: Publishing our benchmark dataset on IEEE DataPort with #ieeedataport gave us a citable DOI within days — reproducibility for our IEEE study is much easier now.
